creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->suspended

libtool-2.4 will be worked on after 7.4 and 8.2 are out the door and 
the ports tree is unfrozen.  There's no sense in doing a patch to 
libtool-2.2 and then implementing 2.4, both of which will most likely 
require a bunch of stuff to be rebuilt.
